message:
fix(cli): use rune-aware truncation in health command

The truncateString function was using byte length which could truncate
mid-character for UTF-8 strings. Changed to use rune slicing for proper
Unicode handling.

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)
